rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SHIRLEY CHONG 2016 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Counsel Michael Freedman, And Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Tentative Ruling by Judge Stephen M. Murphy Petitioner William Chong's Motion to Disqualify Counsel Michael Freedman is DENIED. The Court does not find any attorney misconduct on the part of Attorney Michael Freedman, or that there have been any violations of Rules of Professional Conduct, rules 1.2.1(a), 3.1(a), or 8.4 (c), (d). Petitioner's request for Punitive Damages and Injunction to Cease all Action in the Probate and Trust proceedings is likewise DENIED. The moving party shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling as published above. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
